positive: An aesthetically pleasing, highly stylized minimalist design featuring a vibrant watercolor depiction of a crescent moon and scattering constellations. The style should evoke Nordic folk art meets modern botanical illustration. The composition must be centered, forming a perfect symmetrical motif suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use a limited, contrasting color palette: deep indigo blue, muted gold, and creamy off-white. Incorporate subtle, flowing geometric lines connecting the stellar elements to give a sense of cosmic journey. Clean silhouettes are paramount; the design should read well at small-to-medium scale. High resolution, flat graphic quality, vectorized appearance, vector art, printable surface.
negative: photorealistic, grainy, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, messy, noisy, poor composition, bad anatomy, low detail, extra limbs
